ADB-DriverRight_C1A_SW4

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DA73F2
Recv ID: 18DAF273
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 73
Func Name: ADB-R

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "VALEO",
    "soft": "V00.00",
    "version": "0000"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "4",

    "soft": "V03.00",
    "version": "1746"

  },

    "soft": "V04.00",
    "version": "1816"
  }
]
